test-method.name: testButtons
test-method.description: TC-LGN-01: Login or signup buttons should be present

test-method.name: testInputFields
test-method.description: TC-LGN-02: Assure email/username & password input fields are present

test-method.name: testForgotPassword
test-method.description: TC-LGN-03: Assure forgot password link is present

test-method.name: testInvalidLogin
test-method.description: TC-LGN-04: Assure system rejects wrong credentials

test-method.name: testValidLogin
test-method.description: TC-LGN-05: Assure user can login with valid credentials

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login".
